description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:2.7 Docker image and defines a single stage called check-style. Add a lint job in the check-style stage that first runs `pip install ansible` and `pip install ansible-lint` in a before_script, then executes `ansible-lint tasks/main.yml` followed by `ansible-playbook -i tests/inventory --syntax-check --list-tasks tests/deploy.yml`. The job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules and runs on every pipeline.
